routes.description: Session-validity probe for nginx auth_request (empty body, 200 or 401)
Revoke current session and clear cookie
Change password (revokes all sessions and API tokens)
Current account info (unauthenticated: 401 with bootstrap status)

methods.name: ping
methods.description: Health check — echoes the request ID back to the caller.

methods.name: session_load
methods.description: Load initial session data including filesystem state and provider status.

methods.name: diskfile_update
methods.description: Write new content to a file on disk.

methods.name: diskfile_delete
methods.description: Delete a file from disk.

methods.name: directory_create
methods.description: Create a new directory on disk.

methods.name: completion_create
methods.description: Start an AI completion request, optionally with a progress token for streaming.

methods.name: ollama_list
methods.description: List all locally available Ollama models.

methods.name: ollama_ps
methods.description: List currently running Ollama models.

methods.name: ollama_show
methods.description: Show detailed information about an Ollama model.

methods.name: ollama_pull
methods.description: Pull an Ollama model from the registry.

methods.name: ollama_delete
methods.description: Delete an Ollama model from local storage.

methods.name: ollama_copy
methods.description: Copy an Ollama model under a new name.

methods.name: ollama_create
methods.description: Create a new Ollama model from a Modelfile.

methods.name: ollama_unload
methods.description: Unload an Ollama model from memory.

methods.name: provider_load_status
methods.description: Check the availability and status of an AI provider.

methods.name: provider_update_api_key
methods.description: Update the API key for an AI provider.

methods.name: terminal_create
methods.description: Spawn a PTY process and return the terminal ID.

methods.name: terminal_data_send
methods.description: Send stdin bytes to a terminal.

methods.name: terminal_resize
methods.description: Update PTY dimensions for a terminal.

methods.name: terminal_close
methods.description: Kill a terminal process and return the exit code.

methods.name: workspace_open
methods.description: Open a workspace directory — registers with ScopedFs and starts file watching.

methods.name: workspace_close
methods.description: Close a workspace directory — stops file watching and removes from ScopedFs.

methods.name: workspace_list
methods.description: List all open workspaces.

methods.name: _test_emit_notifications
methods.description: Test-only. Emits `count` `_test_notification` notifications via ctx.notify, then returns {count}.

methods.name: admin_account_list
methods.description: List all accounts with their actors, permits, and pending offers. Admin-only.

methods.name: admin_session_list
methods.description: List every active auth session across all accounts. Admin-only.

methods.name: admin_session_revoke_all
methods.description: Revoke all sessions for an account. Admin-only.

methods.name: admin_token_revoke_all

account_id.description: Account whose API tokens to revoke.

methods.description: Revoke all API tokens for an account. Admin-only.

methods.name: audit_log_list

event_type.description: Filter by event type. Accepts builtin or consumer-registered names (regex-validated).

since_seq.description: Gap-fill from this seq forward. Used for SSE reconnection.

methods.description: List audit log events with optional filters. Admin-only.

methods.name: audit_log_permit_history
methods.description: List permit grant and revoke events with usernames. Admin-only.

methods.name: invite_create
methods.description: Create an invite addressed to an email, username, or both. Admin-only.

methods.name: invite_list
methods.description: List all invites with creator and claimer usernames. Admin-only.

methods.name: invite_delete

invite_id.description: Invite to delete. Must be unclaimed.

methods.description: Delete an unclaimed invite. Admin-only.

methods.name: app_settings_get
methods.description: Read global app settings. Admin-only.

methods.name: app_settings_update

open_signup.description: New value for the open signup toggle.

methods.description: Update global app settings (currently just the open signup toggle). Admin-only.

methods.name: permit_offer_create

scope_id.description: Scope id for resource-scoped grants (e.g. classroom id). `null` for global.

message.description: Optional free-form note from the grantor.

to_account_id.description: Account the offer is directed to.

scope_id.description: Scope the offered permit applies to (e.g. a classroom id). `null` for global permits.

message.description: Optional free-form note from the grantor.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was created.

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp after which the offer is no longer valid.

accepted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was accepted.

declined_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was declined.

retracted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the grantor retracted the offer.

superseded_at.description: ISO timestamp when this offer was obsoleted by a sibling accept or by revoke of the resulting permit.

resulting_permit_id.description: Permit produced by accepting this offer. `null` until/unless accepted.

offer.description: A permit offer — a pending grant awaiting recipient consent.

methods.description: Offer a permit to another account. Grantor must hold the offered role (or pass a consumer authorize callback); role must be web_grantable.

methods.name: permit_offer_accept

to_account_id.description: Account the offer is directed to.

scope_id.description: Scope the offered permit applies to (e.g. a classroom id). `null` for global permits.

message.description: Optional free-form note from the grantor.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was created.

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp after which the offer is no longer valid.

accepted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was accepted.

declined_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was declined.

retracted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the grantor retracted the offer.

superseded_at.description: ISO timestamp when this offer was obsoleted by a sibling accept or by revoke of the resulting permit.

resulting_permit_id.description: Permit produced by accepting this offer. `null` until/unless accepted.

offer.description: A permit offer — a pending grant awaiting recipient consent.

methods.description: Accept an offer. Atomically marks the offer accepted, inserts the permit, and supersedes sibling pending offers for the same (account, role, scope).

methods.name: permit_offer_decline

reason.description: Optional free-form reason given on decline.

methods.description: Decline an offer. Recipient-only.

methods.name: permit_offer_retract
methods.description: Retract an offer. Grantor-only, pre-decision.

methods.name: permit_offer_list

account_id.description: Admin-only — list offers for another account. Defaults to the caller.

to_account_id.description: Account the offer is directed to.

scope_id.description: Scope the offered permit applies to (e.g. a classroom id). `null` for global permits.

message.description: Optional free-form note from the grantor.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was created.

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp after which the offer is no longer valid.

accepted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was accepted.

declined_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was declined.

retracted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the grantor retracted the offer.

superseded_at.description: ISO timestamp when this offer was obsoleted by a sibling accept or by revoke of the resulting permit.

resulting_permit_id.description: Permit produced by accepting this offer. `null` until/unless accepted.

items.description: A permit offer — a pending grant awaiting recipient consent.

methods.description: List pending, non-expired offers for the caller. Admins may pass `account_id` to inspect another account.

methods.name: permit_offer_history

account_id.description: Admin-only — history for another account. Defaults to the caller.

to_account_id.description: Account the offer is directed to.

scope_id.description: Scope the offered permit applies to (e.g. a classroom id). `null` for global permits.

message.description: Optional free-form note from the grantor.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was created.

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp after which the offer is no longer valid.

accepted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was accepted.

declined_at.description: ISO timestamp when the offer was declined.

retracted_at.description: ISO timestamp when the grantor retracted the offer.

superseded_at.description: ISO timestamp when this offer was obsoleted by a sibling accept or by revoke of the resulting permit.

resulting_permit_id.description: Permit produced by accepting this offer. `null` until/unless accepted.

items.description: A permit offer — a pending grant awaiting recipient consent.

methods.description: List every offer involving the caller (either direction), including terminal rows, newest first. Admins may pass `account_id` to inspect another account.

methods.name: permit_revoke

reason.description: Optional free-form reason; stamped on `permit.revoked_reason` and surfaced on the revokee WS notification.

methods.description: Revoke an active permit on a target actor. Admin-only. Supersedes any pending offers for the same (account, role, scope). Fires permit_revoke + permit_offer_supersede notifications.

methods.name: account_verify
methods.description: Verify the current session and echo the caller account.

methods.name: account_session_list
methods.description: List auth sessions for the current account.

methods.name: account_session_revoke
methods.description: Revoke a single auth session for the current account (IDOR-guarded).

methods.name: account_session_revoke_all
methods.description: Revoke every auth session for the current account.

methods.name: account_token_create

name.description: Human-friendly label; shown in the token list.

token.description: Raw token — shown once, store securely.

methods.description: Create an API token for the current account. Raw token is returned once.

methods.name: account_token_list
methods.description: List API tokens for the current account. Hashes are never returned.

methods.name: account_token_revoke
methods.description: Revoke an API token for the current account (IDOR-guarded).

env.name: SECRET_COOKIE_KEYS
env.description: Cookie signing keys, separated by __ for rotation

env.name: ALLOWED_ORIGINS
env.description: Comma-separated origin patterns for API verification

env.name: BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN_PATH
env.description: Path to one-shot admin bootstrap token

env.name: PUBLIC_ZZZ_SCOPED_DIRS
env.description: Comma-separated filesystem paths the server can access

env.name: SECRET_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Anthropic API key for Claude provider

env.name: SECRET_OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: OpenAI API key for ChatGPT provider

env.name: SECRET_GOOGLE_API_KEY
env.description: Google API key for Gemini provider
